title: [trustless://eil] Bartek Kiepuszewski - Interop Risk Framework by L2BEAT
description:
During DevCon Bogota L2BEAT introduced a simple risk framework for bridges. The interop space has evolved significantly since then and Bartek Kiepuszewski of L2BEAT believes that a new comprehensive risk framework for interop is needed not only to surface risks to users, but similarly to the Stages framework for L2s to set guidelines and expectations for the teams building trustless solutions

Talk given during day 1 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
